feed.en: I feed my cat twice a day.

feel.en: I feel happy when I see you.
feel.zh: 看到你時我覺得很開心。

festival.en: The Moon Festival is in autumn.

few.en: Only a few students came early.
few.zh: 只有少數幾位學生早到。

fight.en: The two boys had a fight at school.
fight.zh: 那兩個男孩在學校打了一架。

file.en: Please save the file on the computer.

fill.en: Fill the cup with water, please.

finally.en: After many tries, he finally succeeded.
finally.zh: 嘗試很多次後，他終於成功了。

fine.en: I feel fine today, thank you.

finger.en: She pointed at the bird with her finger.

fire.en: We sat around the fire to keep warm.

first.en: He was the first to finish the race.
first.zh: 他是第一個跑完比賽的人。

fish.en: There are many fish in the river.

floor.en: The toys are all over the floor.

fly.en: Birds can fly in the sky.

follow.en: Please follow me to the classroom.

food.en: We need food and water to live.
food.zh: 我們需要食物和水才能生存。

foreign.en: She is learning a foreign language.

foreigner.en: A foreigner asked me for directions.

forget.en: Don't forget to lock the door.

fork.en: We eat noodles with a fork.

fresh.en: I like to eat fresh fruit.

friendly.en: Our new teacher is very friendly.
friendly.zh: 我們的新老師非常友善。

frog.en: A frog jumped into the pond.

front.en: There is a garden in front of the house.

fruit.en: Apples and bananas are my favorite fruit.
fruit.zh: 蘋果和香蕉是我最愛的水果。

full.en: The box is full of toys.

fun.en: We had a lot of fun at the park.
fun.zh: 我們在公園玩得很開心。

future.en: I want to be a doctor in the future.

game.en: Let's play a fun game together.
game.zh: 我們一起玩個有趣的遊戲吧。

garden.en: Grandma grows roses in her garden.
garden.zh: 奶奶在她的花園裡種玫瑰。

gate.en: Please close the gate when you leave.

get.en: I get a present on my birthday.

ghost.en: The children told ghost stories at night.

giant.en: A giant tree stands in the park.
giant.zh: 公園裡矗立著一棵巨大的樹。

gift.en: She gave me a nice gift.
gift.zh: 她送了我一份很棒的禮物。

girl.en: The girl is reading a book.
girl.zh: 那個女孩正在讀一本書。

give.en: Please give me a glass of water.

glad.en: I am glad to see you again.

glass.en: The cup is made of glass.

glove.en: She wears warm gloves in winter.

go.en: Let's go to the movies tonight.

god-goddess.en: People prayed to the god for rain.

goodbye.en: We said goodbye at the airport.

grade.en: My sister is in the third grade.

grandfather.en: My grandfather tells me old stories.

grass.en: The children are playing on the grass.

gray.en: The sky turned gray before the rain.

green.en: The leaves are green in summer.

ground.en: The ball fell to the ground.

group.en: We worked in a group of four.

grow.en: Plants grow well in the sun.

guitar.en: He plays the guitar very well.

guy.en: That guy is my brother's friend.
guy.zh: 那個傢伙是我哥的朋友。

habit.en: Reading before bed is a good habit.

half.en: I ate half of the cake.

ham.en: I had a ham sandwich for lunch.
ham.zh: 我午餐吃了火腿三明治。

hand.en: Raise your hand if you know the answer.

hang.en: Please hang your coat on the hook.

happy.en: The children are happy on the holiday.

hat.en: He wears a hat to keep out the sun.

head.en: She nodded her head and smiled.

headache.en: I have a bad headache today.

health.en: Good food is important for your health.
health.zh: 好的食物對你的健康很重要。

hear.en: I can hear birds singing outside.
hear.zh: 我能聽到外面鳥兒在唱歌。

heart.en: My heart beats faster when I run.

heat.en: The heat in summer is hard to bear.
heat.zh: 夏天的炎熱讓人難以忍受。

heavy.en: This bag is too heavy for me.
heavy.zh: 這個包對我來說太重了。

hello.en: She said hello to her new classmate.

help.en: Can you help me with my homework?

helpful.en: The shop clerk was very helpful.
helpful.zh: 那位店員非常樂於助人。

hen.en: The hen laid three eggs today.
hen.zh: 那隻母雞今天下了三顆蛋。

here.en: Please come here and sit down.

hide.en: The cat likes to hide under the bed.
hide.zh: 那隻貓喜歡躲在床底下。

hill.en: We climbed up the green hill.
hill.zh: 我們爬上那座綠色的小山。

history.en: I like to read about history.

hit.en: He hit the ball with the bat.

hold.en: Please hold my hand when we cross.
hold.zh: 過馬路時請握住我的手。

holiday.en: We went to the beach during the holiday.

home.en: I stay home when it rains.

homework.en: I finished my homework before dinner.

honest.en: An honest person never tells lies.

hope.en: I hope it will be sunny tomorrow.

horse.en: The horse runs fast in the field.
horse.zh: 那匹馬在田野裡跑得很快。

hospital.en: The sick man was sent to the hospital.

hot.en: The soup is too hot to drink.

hotel.en: We stayed in a nice hotel on the trip.
hotel.zh: 旅行時我們住在一間不錯的飯店。

house.en: They live in a big house.
house.zh: 他們住在一棟大房子裡。

housewife.en: The housewife takes care of her family.
housewife.zh: 那位家庭主婦照顧她的家人。

how.en: How do you go to school?

however.en: It was cold; however, we still went out.
however.zh: 天氣很冷，然而我們還是出門了。

hundred.en: There are a hundred students in the hall.

hungry.en: I am hungry; let's eat now.
hungry.zh: 我餓了，我們現在吃飯吧。

hurt.en: I fell and hurt my knee.

husband.en: Her husband cooks dinner every night.

ice.en: The ice on the lake is thick.

if.en: If it rains, we will stay home.
if.zh: 如果下雨，我們就待在家。

important.en: Sleep is important for your health.
important.zh: 睡眠對你的健康很重要。

in.en: The pen is in the box.

inch.en: The bug is only one inch long.

insect.en: An ant is a small insect.

inside.en: It's raining, so let's stay inside.
inside.zh: 在下雨，我們待在室內吧。

interest.en: She has a strong interest in music.
interest.zh: 她對音樂有濃厚的興趣。

interview.en: He had a job interview yesterday.

into.en: The cat jumped into the box.

invite.en: I will invite my friends to the party.
invite.zh: 我會邀請朋友來參加派對。

island.en: They live on a small island.

item.en: Each item in the shop has a price tag.
item.zh: 店裡每件商品都有價格標籤。

jacket.en: Put on your jacket; it's cold outside.
jacket.zh: 穿上你的夾克，外面很冷。

jeans.en: He wears blue jeans every day.

job.en: My mother has a busy job.

join.en: Would you like to join our club?
join.zh: 你想加入我們的社團嗎？

joke.zh: 他講了一個好笑的笑話。

joy.en: The good news brought us great joy.
joy.zh: 這個好消息帶給我們極大的喜悅。

juice.en: I drink orange juice for breakfast.

jump.en: The frog can jump very far.

key.en: I lost the key to my house.

kick.en: He can kick the ball very hard.

kid.en: The kids are playing in the yard.

kill.en: Too much sun can kill the plant.
kill.zh: 太多陽光會把植物曬死。

king.en: The king lived in a great castle.
king.zh: 國王住在一座宏偉的城堡裡。

kiss.en: The mother gave her baby a kiss.
kiss.zh: 媽媽親了她的寶寶一下。

kitchen.en: Mom is cooking in the kitchen.

kite.en: We flew a kite in the park.

knee.en: He fell and hurt his knee.

knife.en: Be careful with the sharp knife.

know.en: I know the answer to this question.
know.zh: 我知道這個問題的答案。

knowledge-n-lake.en: Reading gives us a lot of knowledge.
knowledge-n-lake.zh: 閱讀帶給我們很多知識。

lamp.en: She turned on the lamp to read.

land.en: The plane will land in ten minutes.
land.zh: 飛機將在十分鐘後降落。

language.zh: 英語是一種有用的語言。

last.en: December is the last month of the year.
last.zh: 十二月是一年的最後一個月。

laugh.en: The funny clown made us laugh.
laugh.zh: 那個滑稽的小丑逗我們笑。

lawyer.en: The lawyer helped them with the case.
lawyer.zh: 律師幫他們處理那件案子。

lazy.en: The lazy cat sleeps all day.

lead.en: The guide will lead us up the mountain.

leader.en: She is the leader of our team.

learn.en: I want to learn how to swim.

least.en: Drink at least eight cups of water a day.

leave.en: We leave for school at seven.
